transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: What I'm interested in is the hidden side of NASA and the even more secretive National Reconnaissance Office, or NRO.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Because after all, Buzz Aldrin was not the first nor the last member of NASA to bring what some might derisively call the woo

text: to the epitome of nuts and bolts aerospace, astrophysics, and rocket fuel.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Just take Edgar Mitchell, Apollo 14 astronaut, the sixth man to walk on the moon,

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: in one of the most outspoken voices linking space exploration with the paranormal.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Mitchell wasn't shy about his belief in extraterrestrial life, or that the US government was probably covering it up.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: But beyond the UFO question, he was also deeply invested in consciousness and the psychic phenomena.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: On his journey to the moon, Mitchell conducted a private ESP, or extrasensory perception experiment,

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: attempting to send mental images back to Earth using a set of cards.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: The results, scored by colleagues back on Earth, were better than chance.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Mitchell wasn't shy about this.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: In a 1971 New York Times interview, he said,

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: We're too much uninformed about telepathy or ESP to project its uses.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: But I think, once we understand the mechanism, then we can start talking about uses.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Few at NASA were interested, except one.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Werner Von Braun.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: War is a dirty business, and all I can say is that I'm happy that it's all over now.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Yes, that Von Braun, former Nazi and father of American rocketry.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He was, according to Mitchell, deeply supportive, even encouraging Mitchell to find a site within NASA to study consciousness further.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: After his mission, Mitchell founded the Institute of Noetic Sciences, a think tank dedicated to consciousness, psychic phenomena, and metaphysics.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Von Braun attended one of its early fundraising dinners.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: For Mitchell, the overview effect, seeing Earth from space, was spiritual.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: It made him wonder if the entire cosmos might be conscious.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: And he wasn't alone.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: There I was.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: And there you are.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: There you are, the Earth, dynamic, overwhelming.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: And I felt that the world was just, just too much purpose, too much logic.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: It was just too beautiful to have happened by accident.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: There has to be somebody bigger than you and bigger than me.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: And I mean this in a spiritual sense, not a religious sense.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: There has to be a creator of the universe who stands above the religions that we ourselves create to govern our lives.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: From the early days of rocketry to the height of the Apollo program,

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: there's been a long tradition of visionary scientists who saw no contradiction between physics and mysticism.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Even today, the pattern continues.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: They're using the images of Roman gods.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: And I would ask him, I said, why are you using the images of Roman gods?

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Why are you putting them on your mission patches and also utilizing Latin phrases from that time period?

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science

text: Who up in space is going to read Latin?

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: And his answer was, our sponsors.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Behind rocket technology, the thrust, the telemetry, the hardware, there is something else, something older.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: There are whispers and subtle acknowledgements to gods.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Ancient symbols, rituals, and perhaps even the influence of non-human intelligence.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: And if that is true, or at least if people involved in this science believe it to be true,

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Is it foundationally entangled in something very strange we've spent millennia trying to understand?

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Are there strange forces helping us get off this planet?

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: So buckle up, alchemists, because this one is going way out there.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: When we think about the moon landing, the rockets, the computers, the broadcasts sent across two hundred and thirty

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: thousand miles of empty space.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: It's easy to forget how recent this kind of knowledge really is.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Just over a century ago, astronomers were still debating the basic structure of the universe.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Einstein had shaken the foundations of physics in 1915 with his general theory of relativity.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: But when it came to the cosmos itself, even the experts weren't sure what they were actually looking at through their telescopes.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Then, in 1923, Edwin Hubble peered through the 100-inch Hooker Telescope at Mount Wilson Observatory and saw something staggering.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: This new telescope was powerful enough to resolve individual stars inside what most had assumed was just a cloud of gas in our own galaxy.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Guess what? It wasn't. That cloud, Andromeda, was another galaxy entirely, millions of light-years away.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: This discovery shattered the old view. Our Milky Way wasn't the whole universe. It was just one among many.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: It changed the cosmic perspective of the 20th century in the same way Copernicus had centuries earlier when he removed the Earth from the center of the solar system.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: And the man who built this observatory that made this discovery possible was one of the most important and strangest figures in the history of modern astronomy.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: I bring you George Ellery Hale.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Hale wasn't just a brilliant physicist. He was a visionary, and in some ways, a mystic.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: While still at MIT, he invented the spectro-heliograph, a device that could capture solar flares erupting from the sun's surface.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: But Hale's fascination with the sun went far beyond science.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He saw astronomy as a kind of philosophy, a link back to ancient Greece, Mesopotamia, Egypt, and Babylon.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He founded multiple observatories, including Mount Wilson in Pasadena.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: The lodges where astronomers stayed were reportedly decorated with Egyptian hieroglyphs and symbols.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: A reminder that they weren't just studying the stars. They were joining a tradition as old as human civilization.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Then there's the stranger part. Hale claimed he received creative inspiration from a being, an elf, or a spirit, as he described it.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Some biographers wrote this off as stress, eccentricity, or mistranslation.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: But what if it wasn't?

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Hale certainly wasn't the first, or the last, brilliant scientist to feel like he was receiving messages from somewhere else.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: His reverence for the sun wasn't just theoretical.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: When he designed the Hale Solar Laboratory in Pasadena, he included a tribute to Ankh-Aten and the arch above the entrance.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: The ancient Egyptian pharaoh who tried to replace the entire Egyptian pantheon with a single god.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Atem, the sun disk.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: When Hale died, his obituaries called him a priest of the sun.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: A modern Zoroaster.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: You might think Hale's beliefs were just personal quirks, unrelated to his science.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: But this fits a much larger pattern.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Throughout history, the people we celebrate for pure science, the mathematicians, the engineers, the astronomers, were often described as tapping into something else.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Something they themselves called mystical, spiritual, or supernatural.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Today, we like to separate the discovery from the discoverer.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: We want breakthroughs to feel rational, mechanical, explainable.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: But that doesn't erase the fact that many of those breakthroughs were made by people who believed they were channeling something deeper.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Back in the early 20th century, Hale's work to help lay the foundations for modern astronomy.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: But his influence didn't stop with telescopes.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He also transformed a small technical school, Throop Polytechnic, into what would become a powerhouse of science and engineering.

text: It became a magnet for the greatest minds on Earth.

text: Hubble, Bohr, Oppenheimer, Heisenberg, even Einstein passed through its halls.

text: But Caltech also attracted outsiders.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: John Whiteside Parsons, Jack to his friends, was born in Pasadena in 1914.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: From an early age, he was hooked on science fiction.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He struggled in school and never earned a formal degree.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: But that didn't matter.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Parsons had an intuitive genius for chemistry and propulsion.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: As a teenager, he and his friend Ed Foreman built homemade rockets, scavenging parts from Foreman's father's workshop.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: One classmate later described them as a couple of powder monkeys going out into the desert, blowing things up.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Jack's mother, worried about his obsession with explosives, sent him to military school.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He was expelled after he blew up a toilet block.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Nothing deterred him.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Parsons had one dream.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: To build a machine that could reach the moon.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: By the early 1930s, he and Foreman were sneaking onto the Caltech campus to meet like-minded students who believed in rocketry.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Just a few years earlier, a Caltech student named Thomas Townsend Brown had formulated a less crude version of space travel.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: But that fell upon deaf ears with top physics professors at Caltech like Robert Milliken.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Parsons was able to gain much more traction.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He found an ally in Frank Molina, an engineering student working under Theodore Von Carmen, one of the sharpest minds in aerodynamics.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Together, they formed an informal rocketry group and began testing experimental engines in the Arroyo Seco, a dry gulch just outside Pasadena.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: That site would later become Jet Propulsion Laboratory, JPL.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Now here's something a lot of people don't realize.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: At about 24 miles altitude, the first stage breaks away and the second stage motors fire.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: In the early 20th century, even some of the most respected physicists believed rockets wouldn't work in space.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: One of them, Caltech's own Fritz Zwicky, the man who coined the term supernova and theorized dark matter, dismissed the idea as nonsense.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: They misunderstood Newton.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: They thought rockets needed something to push against, and in the vacuum of space, there would be nothing to push on.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Even the New York Times mocked the idea in a 1920 editorial.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: So when people like Jack Parsons pursued this, they weren't solving a hard problem.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: They were chasing what many thought was a delusion.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: That makes what they achieved all the more remarkable.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: They believed in the impossible, then figured out how to build it.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: And Parsons, as we'll see, believed in more than just exotic propulsion.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: At Caltech, his raw intuition led to breakthroughs in both solid and liquid fuels, more powerful and reliable than anything that had come before.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: The tests were chaotic and dangerous, but soon the military took notice.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Parsons developed a solid fuel booster, or what would later become the first stage of a rocket, to help heavily loaded aircraft take off.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: They called it Jet Assisted Takeoff, or JADO.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: They avoided using the word rocket because it still sounded too much like science fiction.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: The first successful JADO flight was in 1941.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: By 1942, the US military was ordering 20,000 units per month.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: But just as JPL was taking off, the FBI came knocking.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Because Jack Parsons wasn't just a rocket scientist.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He was also a practicing occultist.

text: He was a devoted member of the Ordo Templi Orientis, or OTO, an esoteric order led at the time by the infamous Aleister Crowley.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Thelema, their belief system, combined ceremonial magic, Eastern mysticism, and tantric techniques into what Crowley called sex magic.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: That's magic with a K, to distinguish it from stage tricks.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Parsons wasn't just a casual participant.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He led the local chapter from a Pasadena mansion where he lived with a rotating cast of artists, intellectuals, and magicians.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: The rituals were elaborate, invoking gods, spirits, and forces said to reside in higher dimensions.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: The most infamous of these was the Babylon Working, an attempt to summon the divine feminine archetype known as Babylon.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Inspired by Crowley's novel Moon Child, the ritual aimed to recreate a magical child through spiritual and sexual practices.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Not literal birth, but transformation of the self.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Kind of a weird extracurricular for a guy who became known as the father of the American space program.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: These weren't acts of fantasy to Parsons.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He believed the rituals had real power.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: That they could raise consciousness, open doorways, and make contact with non-human intelligences.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He wasn't alone in thinking this way.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Gnostic Christian sects, early mystics like Clement of Alexandria, and Tantric traditions in India and China all described sex as a vehicle for divine communion.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Not lust, but willful transformation.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Parsons believed he was continuing that lineage.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: But it gets weirder.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: His ritual partner for the Babylon Working was a man named L. Ron Hubbard.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Yes, that L. Ron Hubbard.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Before founding Scientology, Hubbard helped Parsons conduct the ritual series.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: But soon after, he ran off with Parsons' girlfriend and a chunk of his money.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Parsons, furious, attempted a magical counterattack, invoking the spirit of Mars, Bartzabel, in a Miami hotel room.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Magic or not, Parsons got his compensation.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Hubbard's yacht would promptly encounter a storm, and a court later forced him to pay Parsons back.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: After that, some began to wonder if the Babylon Working had actually succeeded.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: If it had opened something up in 1946.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Because in the years that followed, reports of unidentified aerial phenomena began to skyrocket.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Parsons himself believed he had made contact.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He said he was being guided by non-human intelligence.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: That idea surfaces in Diana Pasolka's work as well.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: The notion that visionary scientists may have been receiving messages, insights, or downloads from something beyond.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: It also is a prominent theme in Professor Jimena Canales' book, Bedeviled, about the history of demons and science.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Parsons wasn't alone in this belief.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Pythagoras, Newton, and even Edison spoke of mystical inspiration or communion with unseen forces.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Edison, near the end of his life, actually tried to build a device to communicate with the dead.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: So even if we keep our skeptic hats on, we're left with this strange pattern.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Many of the people responsible for scientific breakthroughs, people we call geniuses, didn't see themselves as inventors.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: They saw themselves as receivers.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: In Parsons' case, he believed he was building technology to carry humanity into space, with the help of something else.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He would sometimes recite Crowley's hymn to Pan during rocket tests.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: According to legendary French UFO researcher Jacques Vallée, there were rumors of a ritual in the Mojave, where a blonde woman appeared and claimed to be from Venus.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: If true, this would have been the first recorded encounter with a quote-unquote Nordic, or tall white, non-human entity, predating similar contactee stories by years.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Eventually, Parsons' occult lifestyle, strange houseguests, and growing paranoia led to trouble.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He was pushed out of JPL.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: In 1952, he died in an explosion in his home laboratory.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Officially, it was ruled an accident involving volatile chemicals.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: But some found the circumstances suspicious.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Parsons left a crater on Earth, but also one on the Moon.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Literally.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: A lunar crater now bears his name.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: And at JPL, some insiders still call it, Jack Parsons Laboratory.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Others just say, Jack Parsons Lives.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Now you might be thinking, sure, there was one eccentric rocket guy with a thing for ritual magic.

text: Maybe he laid the groundwork for ICBMs and Apollo.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Longtime viewers of this show will know we've covered evidence linking the Third Reich to UFO technology before.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: From reports that Hitler knew about the 1933 Magenta crash.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: To the post-war absorption of German rocket scientists experimenting with exotic propulsion.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: But what often surprises people isn't just the tech.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: It's the fact that the highest level of Hitler's regime were obsessed with the occult.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: This wasn't just Hollywood fantasy.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Sure, Indiana Jones gave us Nazis hunting for the Ark of the Covenant.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: But the truth is stranger.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: In 1945, near the end of the war, American forces uncovered a hidden stash of Nazi documents in a cave in southern Germany.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Among them were records, revealing real state-sponsored occult projects.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Expeditions to Tibet to trace Aryan origins.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Searches for ancient runestones, pagan sites, and even a government-backed quest to find the Holy Grail.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: A lot of this stemmed from Heinrich Himmler, head of the SS and one of the architects of the Holocaust.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He was obsessed with Germanic mythology, paganism, and mystical power.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He turned Wellesburg Castle into a ritual center, complete with a black sun chamber beneath it and a round table for his SS knights.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He also created the Anna Nürbe, a pseudoscientific institute devoted to proving that the so-called Aryan race descended from Atlantis.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: And yes, they actually believed that.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: The Nazi Party itself was born out of the Thule Society, a Volkish secret group that mixed Germanic paganism, Atlantis myths, and Aryan esotericism.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: The Thule Society held seances and rituals meant to contact non-human intelligences they believed were their ancient progenitors.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Star beings from the far north, beneath the Polestar.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: They performed these rites at symbolic locations, like the Harts Mountains.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: On nights like Walpurgisnot, a festival tied to witches, spirits, and old pagan ceremonies.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: There are also claims about the Vril Society, a group said to have channeled anti-gravity technology and psychic powers from an ancient subterranean race.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Now, we don't have to believe any of these occult theories themselves, but what matters is the Nazis did.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: And it didn't just stop at mysticism.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: The Nazis were also pioneers of actual rocket science.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: One of the key figures was Hermann Oberth.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Born in Transylvania, inspired by sci-fi writer Jules Verne, Oberth began theorizing about spaceflight as a teenager.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: In 1923, he published The Rocket into Planetary Space, a landmark book that laid out how a multi-stage rocket could escape Earth's gravity.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He was decades ahead of his time.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He envisioned orbiting telescopes, spacesuits, weather-controlling satellites, even missions to other planets.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: His ideas sparked a movement, and when World War II began, Oberth was pulled into military work, building rockets for Germany and later for Italy.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: After the war, Oberth became one of the few major scientists to publicly support the reality of UFOs.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: After so many witnesses have seen the so-called flying saucers, their existence cannot longer be denied.

text: I believe that these flying objects come from another solar system.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: In a 1954 lecture, he argued that these UFOs had been observed since at least the 1400s.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Oberth believed they were piloted by extraterrestrial visitors, monitoring Earth's nuclear sites and military tech.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: In interviews, he even said,

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: We cannot take all of the credit for our record advancements in certain scientific fields.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: We have been helped.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: When asked by whom, he replied,

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: The people of the other worlds.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Later in life, Oberth was invited to watch the launch of Apollo 11 and the space shuttle Challenger.

text: But he wasn't part of the official Operation Paperclip transfer of Nazi scientists.

text: Von Braun wasn't just a German rocket scientist.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He was the architect of the V-2 missile program, a major in the SS and one of the top minds in Hitler's war machine.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Like Parsons, Von Braun had dreamed of space since he was a boy.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: But where Parsons was invoking goddesses in desert rituals, Von Braun was swearing loyalty to Himmler and building rockets with slave labor from concentration camps.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: After the war, the U.S. swept Von Braun up in Operation Paperclip, a covert mission to extract Nazi scientists.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He was captured in Bavaria, where a young Henry Kissinger was actually helping run counterintelligence for the United States.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Von Braun's record was scrubbed and he was given a new job.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Build America's space program.

text: And that he did.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Von Braun became the public face of NASA, a media darling, the man behind the Saturn V rocket that took us to the moon.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: But the overall size and weight of the rocket is mainly determined by the 11 tons weight of this top section.

text: This weight dictates the amount of fuel and the numbers of motors needed to produce enough power to equalize the gravitational pull of the Earth.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: But behind the scenes, many of the ideas, the scientists, and even the weirdness of the Nazi space program had been brought into the American one.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: As we'll see, the weirdness didn't vanish.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: It just changed uniforms.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: But before we get to NASA's more esoteric side, we need to check in with the other major player in the space race.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Before Parsons, NASA, or the Nazis, another conception of human purpose, one tied to our place in the universe, was emerging in late 19th century Russia.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Something we now call Russian cosmism.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: It began with a librarian and philosopher named Nikolai Fyodorov, who believed the true task of humanity and Christianity was not to await resurrection, but to cause it.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He believed that one day, technology would allow us to resurrect every human who had ever lived.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: And that once death was defeated, humanity's next task would be to colonize the cosmos.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Among those most influenced by Fyodorov and his ideas was a deaf, self-taught young man named Konstantin Tsiolkovsky.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He would become known as the father of Russian spaceflight.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Tsiolkovsky didn't just believe space travel was possible.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He believed it was necessary.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He saw humanity as part of a cosmic process, destined to leave Earth and populate the stars.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: In 1903, he developed what we now call the Tsiolkovsky rocket equation.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: The fundamental formula describing how a rocket accelerates based on its mass and exhaust velocity.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Like Oberth, he anticipated breakthroughs in rocketry and space exploration well before they were technologically feasible.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: And here's where things get especially strange.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: As Diana Pasolka points out in American Cosmic, Tsiolkovsky believed that non-human intelligences,

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: what he called ethereal beings, were communicating with us through celestial symbols.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He wrote,

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: We are made as the ethereal beings, existing beyond our dimensions of recognized reality.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: These higher beings are in communication with us, reading our thoughts and sending us messages through celestial symbols,

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: which most of us do not even perceive, much less understand.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: A genius is one who comprehends and channels these messages from higher beings into technologies, products and even art.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Tsiolkovsky seemed to believe that his rocket science, the very math that would take humans off Earth,

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: was received through this kind of cosmic transmission.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: He may have seen himself not only as an engineer, but as a medium for an intelligence beyond human understanding.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Another example of someone who saw the spiritual dimension of science as fundamental to the work itself.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Even as the Soviet Union officially rejected religion, it opened the door to a different kind of cosmic mythology,

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: one in which ancient contact with extraterrestrials was treated not as fantasy, but as a legitimate scientific possibility.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: These ideas were often framed in speculative or scientific language,

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: a political workaround that allowed Soviet thinkers to explore humanity's possible contact with advanced extraterrestrial civilizations without invoking the supernatural.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Figures like Alexander Kazantsev and Felix Ziegel proposed that alien visitors may have influenced early human development,

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: seeding myths and technologies that were later taken on by ancient cultures.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Unlike in the West, where such theories were typically fringe, in the USSR they were sometimes discussed in academic circles,

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: covered in state-run media, and even investigated by military and intelligence services.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: This made paleocontact, as they called it, not just a conspiracy theory, but a semi-legitimate line of inquiry into humanity's cosmic origins.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: But it was the Americans who won the space race when they made it to the moon.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: And maybe, just maybe, that mission carried within it a hidden reverence for the esoteric dimensions of spaceflight

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: that men like Tsiolkovsky and Fyodorov had long envisioned.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Maybe the space race wasn't just a Cold War pissing contest, but a transcendental mission.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: Which brings us to NASA, where the weird gets even weirder.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: NASA was officially established on July 29th, 1958, by the National Aeronautics and Space Act.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: On paper, this document laid out that NASA was supposed to be a civilian agency for space exploration,

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: devoted to quote-unquote peaceful purposes for the benefit of all mankind.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: But that idealism is tempered in the very next paragraph.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: The act makes clear that the general welfare and security of the United States requires such an organization.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: And that any activities, peculiar to or primarily associated with weapons systems, military operations, or the defense of the United States, fall outside the civilian mandate.

transcript_title: Nasa Ufos Pagan Rituals Secret Science
text: In practice, that meant if NASA found anything deemed strategically sensitive, at all, a breakthrough in propulsion, a powerful new sensor, or even contact with non-human intelligence, it could be withheld indefinitely.

text: It's a reminder of something we've talked about before.

text: So it's kind of a sneaky way.
